SEARCH

Uses of Class
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.model.Usuario

Packages that use Usuario
Package
Description
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.controller
Package containing REST controllers for managing users (usuarios) and related authentication operations in the user management system.
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.repository
Package containing repository interfaces responsible for data persistence operations related to user management.
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.service
Package containing service classes responsible for handling user authentication and authorization, including generation and validation of JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for secure access to application endpoints and service classes responsible for handling business logic related to user management, including creation, update, deletion of users, login verification, and validation of unique identifiers.

    Method
    Description

    Retrieves all users.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    UsuarioController.crear(Usuario c)
    Creates a new user (Usuario).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Usuario>
    UsuarioRepository.findByCedulaUsuario(Long cedulaUsuario)
    Finds a user by their unique identification number (cedula).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Usuario>
    UsuarioService.buscarPorId(Long id)
    Finds a user by its ID.
    Optional<Usuario>
    UsuarioService.login(String user, String password)
    Validates user login credentials.
    List<Usuario>
    UsuarioService.mostrarTodo()
    Retrieves all users stored in the database.
    Methods in co.edu.unbosque.usuario.service with parameters of type Usuario
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    UsuarioService.actualizar(Long id, Usuario nuevaData)
    Updates an existing user with new data.
    int
    UsuarioService.crear(Usuario o)
    Creates a new user if the identification number (cedula) is not already taken.
    boolean
    UsuarioService.findTitleAlreadyTaken(Usuario newUsuario)
    Checks if a user's identification number (cedula) already exists.
